description: 网页搜索引导 - CLI onboard 搜索提供商选择

replacements.\"No web search providers are currently: "当前插件策略下没有可用的网页搜索提供商。"
replacements.\"Enable plugins or remove deny rules, t: "启用插件或删除拒绝规则，然后重新运行设置。"
replacements.\"Web search lets your agent look things: "网页搜索让您的智能体在线查找信息。"
replacements.\"Choose a provider. Some providers need: "选择一个提供商。部分提供商需要 API 密钥，部分无需密钥即可使用。"
replacements.label: \"Skip for now\",\n hint::
label: "暂时跳过",
        hint: "稍后通过 openclaw configure --section web 配置"
replacements.`${entry.label} works without an API key: `${entry.label} 无需 API 密钥即可使用。`
replacements.\"OpenClaw will enable the plugin and us: "OpenClaw 将启用该插件并将其用作 web_search 提供商。"
replacements.\"Secret references enabled \u2014 OpenC: "已启用密钥引用 — OpenClaw 将存储引用而不是 API 密钥."
replacements.placeholder: keyConfigured ? \"Leave bla: placeholder: keyConfigured ? "留空保持当前" : entry.placeholder
replacements.`No ${credentialLabel} stored \u2014 web: `未存储 ${credentialLabel} — 在有可用密钥之前 web_search 无法使用.`
